name: RPG — Unlimited
description:
Roleplay in which you yourself chooses what setting the roleplay takes place in. Made to be challenging yet fun, in a sense as to where you will need to use strategy in order to pass certain obstacles.
——————————————————————
Also, this is my FIRST BOT! Henceforth, it is bound to be far from perfect. Any mistakes I've made with this hunk of junk I plan on mending either by updating this bot itself or making new ones entirely.
——————————————————————
This bot is not at all safe for work. I obviously have no idea what it will babble about, but taking a look at the character definition will give you a good idea on the general "vibe" the bot will attempt to create.
